actions.description: Load working.yaml then working_1.yaml, working_2.yaml, ... from a directory and execute the roboclick actions defined in each file one by one. Each file may define a single action (flat keys) or a list under actions:. {variable} placeholders are replaced with values from the part workings.

variables.name: directory
variables.description: Path to the folder containing working.yaml and working_N.yaml files.

variables.name: mode_ai_wait
variables.description: AI wait strategy (slow, fast_button_state, or fast_clipboard_state).

actions.returns: Executes all actions found in the directory sequence.

variables.name: file_name
variables.description: File name to read or write for this action.

variables.name: position_click
variables.description: Screen position used to open the generated image context menu.

variables.name: mode_ai_wait
variables.description: AI wait strategy (slow, fast_button_state, or fast_clipboard_state).

variables.name: retry_if_failed
variables.description: Number of times to ask the AI to retry and save again if the expected image file is missing. Use false or 0 to disable.

variables.name: base_ai_provider
variables.description: AI provider to use for this action. Options: open_ai, claude, gemini, open_web_ui.

variables.name: log_url
variables.description: Whether to capture and store the current chat URL.

variables.name: description
variables.description: Optional kickoff note sent in the first chat message.

variables.name: text
variables.description: Text content used by this action.

variables.description: File name to read or write for this action. if folder name starts with source_files it will pull from project source_files rather than folder

variables.description: Closing tag used to extract copied text before falling back to clip.

variables.name: clip
variables.description: Clipboard text payload to save. default:&&&tag for copy&&&

variables.name: sanitize_text
variables.description: Whether saved text should replace common Unicode punctuation with ASCII-friendly text and remove emoji.

variables.name: sanitize_double_linebreaks
variables.description: Whether repeated line breaks should be reduced by half so accidental doubles become singles and four line breaks become two.

variables.description: Mode selector controlling action behavior.

actions.description: Pause execution for N seconds with optional skip mechanisms.
actions.summary: Pause execution for N seconds with optional skip mechanisms.

variables.name: delay
variables.description: Number of seconds to delay (default: 1)

variables.name: rand
variables.description: Additional random seconds to add to delay (default: 0)

variables.name: message
variables.description: Optional message to print before delaying

variables.name: mode_skip_key
variables.description: Whether pressing 's' should skip the delay (default: true)

variables.name: mode_scroll_lock_skip
variables.description: Whether toggling Scroll Lock should skip the delay (default: true, Windows only)

actions.returns: empty string normally; may early-return on skip

actions.description: Create a zip from explicit files and/or directory trees. If any required source is missing, write a <zip>_error.txt listing the gaps and exit the chain. Also zip that error text as <zip>_error.zip. On missing sources, delete any stale zip. On success, delete any prior error files.
actions.summary: Create a zip from explicit files and/or directory trees.

variables.name: zip_path
variables.description: Absolute path where the zip file should be written.

variables.name: files
variables.description: List of dicts with 'arcname' (name inside zip) and 'source' (absolute path). Example: [{'arcname': 'story_guide.md', 'source': '/abs/path/story_guide.md'}]

variables.name: dirs
variables.description: List of dicts with 'path' (absolute dir to walk recursively) and 'arcname_prefix' (prefix inside the zip for files in this dir). Example: [{'path': '/abs/source/raw', 'arcname_prefix': 'source/raw'}]. Dirs must exist; missing dirs are reported as errors.

actions.returns: None on success, exit_no_tab if file missing.

actions.description: Key a flat chroma screen background (green or magenta) out of an image, replacing it with real transparency, in place.

variables.name: file_name
variables.description: Image to process, relative to the part directory. Overwritten as an RGBA png.

variables.name: color_key
variables.description: Which screen colour to remove: green or magenta.

variables.description: Keyness where edge feathering starts.

variables.name: threshold_high
variables.description: Keyness treated as pure background.

actions.description: Jinja template. When `robo_roboclick.robo_text_jinja_template()` receives string values in `dict_data` or the source yaml, it automatically adds template helper strings for each key: `{key}_upper`, `{key}_lower`, `{key}_length_1` through `{key}_length_9`, plus `{key}_length_1_upper` through `{key}_length_9_upper` and `{key}_length_1_lower` through `{key}_length_9_lower`.

variables.name: file_template
variables.description: Template file to render with Jinja variables.

variables.name: file_source
variables.description: Path to the source input file.

variables.name: file_output
variables.description: Output file path for rendered text or converted assets.

variables.name: search_and_replace
variables.description: Search/replace rules applied during templating.

variables.name: convert_to_pdf
variables.description: Whether to convert rendered output to PDF.

variables.name: convert_to_png
variables.description: Whether to convert rendered output to PNG.

variables.name: dict_data
variables.description: Dictionary data passed into template rendering. For each string value, the template also gets helper strings named `{key}_upper`, `{key}_lower`, `{key}_length_1` to `{key}_length_9`, `{key}_length_1_upper` to `{key}_length_9_upper`, and `{key}_length_1_lower` to `{key}_length_9_lower`.

variables.name: dict_data_yaml_files
variables.description: Map of template variable names to YAML files whose parsed contents are loaded fresh at render time.

variables.name: file_name
variables.description: Primary file name to wait for in the action directory.

variables.name: file_name_1
variables.description: first candidate file name to wait for.

variables.name: file_name_2
variables.description: second candidate file name to wait for.

variables.name: file_name_3
variables.description: third candidate file name to wait for.

variables.name: file_name_4
variables.description: fourth candidate file name to wait for.

variables.name: file_name_5
variables.description: fifth candidate file name to wait for.

variables.name: file_name_6
variables.description: sixth candidate file name to wait for.

variables.name: timeout
variables.description: Seconds to wait before exiting the current action chain.

variables.name: interval
variables.description: Seconds between file checks.
